# Pricing clarity ad

## When to use

Use when buyers fear hidden cost.

## Why it works

Reduces uncertainty.

## Mechanism

Transparent pricing filters and attracts.

## Required inputs

Pricing page, calculator, plan comparison.

## When not to use

If pricing is truly custom and complex.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Pricing views, qualified leads, close rate.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
